tests.name: /api/spine/execute returns preflight response for OPTIONS
/api/spine/execute returns 401 when Bearer token is missing
/api/spine/execute returns 400 when agent_id is missing
/api/spine/execute returns 401 when agent_id and api key do not resolve
/api/spine/execute executes successfully with valid agent credentials
/api/spine/execute issues intent and retries execute when no pending runtime intent exists
/api/spine/execute returns 402 when quota is exceeded
/api/spine/execute returns 403 when agent is not active
/api/intent returns preflight response for OPTIONS
/api/intent returns 401 when Bearer token is missing
/api/intent returns 400 when agent_id is missing
/api/intent returns 401 when agent_id and api key do not resolve
/api/intent issues runtime intent with resolved org_id
/api/execute critical route contract returns 401 when bearer token is missing
/api/execute critical route contract returns 400 when agent_id is missing
/api/execute critical route contract returns 401 when agent_id and api key do not resolve
/api/execute critical route contract returns 403 when the agent is not active
/api/execute critical route contract executes active agent request and returns the spine engine body
/api/execute critical route contract issues a runtime intent and retries when no pending runtime intent exists
/api/execute critical route contract returns 429 and rate-limit headers when rate limit blocks the request
buildDriftSnapshot includes policy_version from env
buildDriftSnapshot hash_algorithm is sha256
buildDriftSnapshot deployment_config_hash changes when GITHUB_SHA changes
buildDriftSnapshot captured_at is a valid ISO date
buildDriftSnapshot deployment_config_hash starts with sha256: followed by 64 hex chars
buildDriftSnapshot deployment_config_hash is same whether NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL is unset or empty string
buildDriftSnapshot deployment_config_hash is same whether DSG_CONTROL_PLANE_BASE_URL is unset or empty string
buildDriftSnapshot deployment_config_hash is same whether VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA is unset or empty string
detectDrift — no previous changed=false when previous is null
detectDrift — with previous detects policy_version change
detectDrift — with previous detects deployment_config_hash change
detectDrift — with previous detects hash_algorithm change
detectDrift — with previous no change when snapshots are identical except captured_at
detectDrift — with previous invalidated_attestations is deduplicated
snapshotHash is deterministic for the same snapshot content
snapshotHash changes when policy_version changes
snapshotHash is prefixed with sha256:
evaluateGate — decision boundaries BLOCK when riskScore >= 0.8
evaluateGate — decision boundaries STABILIZE when riskScore >= 0.4 but < 0.8
evaluateGate — decision boundaries ALLOW when riskScore < 0.4 and no oscillation
evaluateGate — decision boundaries STABILIZE on oscillation even with low riskScore
evaluateGate — decision boundaries no oscillation when window too small
evaluateGate — decision boundaries oscillation when spread >= 0.35 in last 4 scores
evaluateGate — decision boundaries no oscillation when spread < 0.35
runPipeline — gate BLOCK short-circuits arbiters returns BLOCK from gate and skips arbiters
runPipeline — gate BLOCK short-circuits arbiters ALLOW from gate lets arbiter escalate to STABILIZE
GET /api/health returns a response with ok field
GET /api/health response shape includes service, timestamp, db_ok, core_ok, rateLimiter, core, readiness
GET /api/health returns 200 when all checks pass
GET /api/health returns 503 when db is unreachable
GET /api/health returns 503 when rate limiter is not configured
buildEvidenceEnvelope produces schema_version 1.0.0
buildEvidenceEnvelope sets severity_level from evidence type
buildEvidenceEnvelope assigns severity 1 to unit, 2 to integration, 3 to adversarial, 5 to provenance
buildEvidenceEnvelope chain_hash is prefixed with sha256:
buildEvidenceEnvelope chain_hash changes when metrics change
buildEvidenceEnvelope carries previous_chain_hash when supplied
buildEvidenceEnvelope sets expires_at when ttlSeconds provided
buildEvidenceEnvelope stores nonce when provided
buildEvidenceEnvelope includes sbom_ref when provided
buildEvidenceEnvelope generated_at is a valid ISO date
verifyEnvelopeIntegrity returns ok=true for a freshly built envelope
verifyEnvelopeIntegrity returns ok=false when chain_hash is tampered
verifyEnvelopeIntegrity returns ok=false when metrics are tampered
verifyEnvelopeIntegrity expected hash matches chain_hash for a valid envelope
buildRunContextFromEnv reads repo and commit from env
buildRunContextFromEnv builds invocation_id from run_id + attempt
buildOIDCFromEnv builds sub from repo + ref
buildOIDCFromEnv uses provided audience
GET /api/audit returns 401 when not authenticated
GET /api/audit returns 403 when role is insufficient
GET /api/audit returns 200 with ok, items, and determinism fields when authorized
GET /api/audit items array contains audit events
GET /api/audit limit query param caps results at 100
GET /api/audit returns core_ok field reflecting audit events state
read tools execute directly without hermes gate
approval check blocks without approval token
hermes gate on write tool PASS and executes when proof is present
hermes gate on write tool BLOCK when proof is missing
browser_navigate maps to browser_qa mode PASS with proof
browser_navigate maps to browser_qa mode PASS without proof (observe-no-audit fast path)
preflight blocks BLOCK when tool prompt implies .env access
GET /api/readiness returns 200 with ok:true when all checks pass
GET /api/readiness returns 503 with ok:false when any check fails
GET /api/readiness response body matches ReadinessReport shape with checks and timestamp
GET /api/readiness checks object contains expected keys
GET /api/readiness returns 500 when getDeploymentReadiness throws
detectOscillation returns false when window has fewer scores than required
detectOscillation returns false for empty array
detectOscillation returns false when spread is below threshold
detectOscillation returns true when max-min >= oscillationSpread
detectOscillation uses only the last oscillationWindow entries
detectOscillation respects custom oscillationWindow and oscillationSpread
detectOscillation returns false when called with no arguments (default empty array)
detectOscillation returns true when spread equals exactly oscillationSpread threshold (0.35)
detectOscillation returns false when spread is one epsilon below oscillationSpread (0.35)
evaluateGate — default policy returns BLOCK when riskScore >= blockRiskScore (0.8)
evaluateGate — default policy returns STABILIZE when riskScore >= stabilizeRiskScore (0.4) and no oscillation
evaluateGate — default policy returns STABILIZE on oscillation even with low riskScore
evaluateGate — default policy returns ALLOW when risk is low and stable
evaluateGate — default policy returns ALLOW with no recentRiskScores and low riskScore
evaluateGate — default policy BLOCK takes priority over oscillation
evaluateGate — default policy includes reason string in all decision types
evaluateGate — custom policy respects custom blockRiskScore
evaluateGate — custom policy respects custom stabilizeRiskScore
evaluateGate — custom policy applies custom oscillation params
SpineInfraError is an instance of Error
SpineInfraError has correct name property
SpineInfraError carries the message through
runPipeline — SpineInfraError cases throws SpineInfraError when gate plugin is not found
runPipeline — SpineInfraError cases throws SpineInfraError when registered plugin has wrong kind
runPipeline — initial string literal state ALLOW gate with no arbiters: final_decision is ALLOW, final_reason is gate reason
issueSpineIntent + executeSpineIntent approval flow issues a new pending intent and reuses it on second call
issueSpineIntent + executeSpineIntent approval flow returns 409 when intent already consumed
gate registry resolves risk-gate by default
gate registry risk-gate returns BLOCK with proof_hash for high risk
gate registry risk-gate returns ALLOW with proof_hash for low risk
gate registry proof_hash is deterministic
gate registry throws for unknown plugin id
dsg-core mode resolution throws when DSG_CORE_MODE is not explicit
dsg-core mode resolution throws in remote mode when DSG_CORE_URL is missing
dsg-core internal mode returns internal health in explicit internal mode
dsg-core internal mode throws when internal mode execution omits risk score
dsg-core internal mode uses internal runtime gate when risk score is provided

playground evaluate — gate integration STABILIZE at exact boundary 0.4
playground evaluate — gate integration BLOCK at exact boundary 0.8
